Two French 🇫🇷 diplomats in Iran 🇮🇷 were detained and intimidated by Iranian security services last night, says French Foreign Minister Jean-Noël Barrot. They were detained without reason for several hours and interrogated, and one was physically assaulted. They were eventually released to the French embassy and are returning to France in the coming hours.

I assess that the group will continue prioritizing the reconstruction of its military capabilities while showing no intention of giving up its weapons. A leadership change does not necessarily signal a change in Hamas' core strategic objectives.

A very fruitful hunt by Ukrainian drones against Russian air defenses last night. Notably, strikes focused on targets in southern Russia, not the occupied territories.
